elements.label: Description
elements.value: After each drop, a cooldown prevents the next item from appearing. This creates the game's rhythm and gives players time to observe merges before their next decision.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/drop_timing.schema.json, set dtp_cooldown to {{dtp_cooldown}}]
Set DROP_COOLDOWN to {{dtp_cooldown}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/properties/drop_timing.schema.json, set dtp_merge_cd to {{dtp_merge_cd}}]
Set MERGE_COOLDOWN to {{dtp_merge_cd}} seconds.
